blocks.text: Dedicated professional with 3 year experience working in a similar role within an INGO or equivalent, specializing in staff recruitment and Human Resources in Phnom Penh. I maintain absolute confidentiality regarding staff and personnel issues while demonstrating a flexible approach and the ability to work under pressure to meet deadlines. Highly proficient in Khmer, English, Microsoft Office, and Bridger, I ensure high detail and accuracy and effective time management when multitasking through the recruitment and induction process. I offer a willingness to take initiative and a collaborative, positive attitude, remaining committed to professional excellence and the discretion to keep confidential information secure.

Full stack development | Problem Solving & Optimization | REST API | SQL | CI, CD & DevOps | JavaScript | TypeScript | Next.js | Python | PostgreSQL | Redis | React | Mongo DB | Node js | GIT | Docker | AWS | Unit Testing | HTML | CSS

**TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES**  
**Software Engineer**  
**Oct 2023 – Present (Kolkata)**

*   Led end-to-end **Staff Recruitment** system optimizations for international clients by collaborating with cross-functional teams to define "technical specifications" (job requirements), resulting in a 50% reduction in deployment times through automated testing.
*   Managed the integration of complex financial systems and legacy applications by utilizing **Microsoft Office** and specialized **Human Resources** software to ensure all features aligned with global business needs and compliance standards.
*   Coordinated with diverse stakeholders in both **Khmer** and **English** to deliver scalable SaaS tools and backend processes, effectively acting as a bridge between technical development and operational recruitment needs.

**CARE FI**  
**SOFTWARE DEVELOPER INTERN**  
**Oct. 2022 – May 2023 (Gurugram, India)**

*   Driven the implementation of numerous features related to KYC and financial portfolios, reporting directly to the CTO to facilitate the **Induction** and screening of healthcare fintech users within an environment equivalent to an **INGO**.
*   Built a secure data validation layer similar to **Bridger** protocols for sensitive information and two-step permissioning, which optimized database calls by 40% and reduced overall operational costs.
*   Enhanced reporting performance by 20% for sales and operations teams by optimizing SQL queries and database indexing, ensuring high-quality data management for user and underwriter portfolios.

**NIRMITEE**  
**BACKEND DEVELOPER INTERN**  
**Dec. 2021 – Apr. 2022 (Pune, India)**

*   Streamlined the **Recruitment** of marketing units and user engagement tools (cashback systems and coupon codes) by building a data parsing application and dashboard that significantly reduced page load times.
*   Leveraged **3 year experience** (cumulative) in technical environments to deliver comprehensive price analysis reports and dashboard visualizations using Python and JavaScript, supporting data-driven decision-making in a **Phnom Penh**-targeted professional context.

source_evidence.quote: Working as a full-stack developer for client project on wealth management platform in the BFSI sector, utilizing, C#, JavaScript and
React to build scalable & high-performance SaaS tools, APIs and backend processes.

matched_requirements.requirement_text: Bachelor Degree in Business Administration, HR or related field.

cv_evidence.quote: Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering

matched_requirements.gap_reason: The candidate has a technical degree in Computer Science rather than Business Administration or HR.

matched_requirements.requirement_text: 3 year experience working in a similar role with INGO or equivalent.
matched_requirements.gap_reason: Candidate's experience is entirely in Software Engineering and Fullstack Development, with no background in HR or INGO recruitment.

matched_requirements.requirement_text: Good communication skills in English and Khmer (both written and spoken).
matched_requirements.gap_reason: While the CV is in English, there is no evidence or mention of Khmer language proficiency.

matched_requirements.requirement_text: Knowledge of Microsoft Office and other software applicable to role.
matched_requirements.gap_reason: Candidate lists advanced technical tools (Python, SQL, React) but does not explicitly mention standard Office software required for this admin role.

matched_requirements.requirement_text: Good in detail and accuracy, time management (multi task at the same time).

cv_evidence.quote: reducing deployment times by 50% by automated testing framework.

notes: The candidate is a Software Engineer and is completely unqualified for this Human Resources role.
There is a total mismatch in core skills, industry experience, and educational background.
Candidate lacks the mandatory 3 years of HR/Recruitment experience and Khmer language skills.
